set; }\n        public string Name { get; set; }\n        public string Description { get; set; }\n        public decimal Price { get; set; }\n        public string UnitOfMeasure { get; set; }\n        public int MinimumStock { get; .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n\n            // User 1-N Order\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Order>()\n                .HasOne(o => o.User)\n                .WithMany(u => u.Orders)\n GetById(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Products\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(p => p.Category)\n                .Include(p => p.Supplier)\n                .Include(p => p.InventoryItems)\n                    .ThenInclude(ii => ii.Warehouse)\n                .Include(p => p.OrderItems)\n                    .ThenInclude(oi => oi.Order)\n                .FirstOrDefault(p => p.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public void Add(Product product)\n        {\n            _context.Products.Add(product);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public void Update(Product product)\n        {\n            _context.Products.Update(product);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public bool Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var product = _context.Products.FirstOrDefault(p => p.Id == id);\n\n            if (product == null)\n                return false;\n\n            if (!CanDelete(id))\n                return false;\n\n            _context.Products.Remove(product);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        public bool Exists(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Products.Any(p => p.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public bool CanDelete(int id)\n        {\n            var product = _context.Products\n                .Include(p => p.OrderItems)\n                .Include(p => p.InventoryItems)\n                .FirstOrDefault(p => p.Id == id);\n\n            if (product == null)\n                return false;\n\n            return !product.OrderItems.Any() && !product.InventoryItems.Any();\n        }\n    }\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01MmoG6zZxbVKxiN5xQ82Y1y__vscode-1779365922555","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

_repository.Add(product);\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"catalog/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"Product/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id)\n        {\n            var product = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (product == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            var model = new ProductFormModel\n            {\n                Id = product.Id,\n                Name = product.Name,\n                Description = product.Description,\n                Price = product.Price,\n                Type = product.Type,\n                CategoryId = product.CategoryId,\n                CategoryDisplayName = product.Category?.Name,\n                SupplierId = product.SupplierId,\n                SupplierDisplayName = product.Supplier?.Name\n            };\n\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [Route(\"catalog/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"Product/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id, ProductFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (id != model.Id)\n            {\n                return BadRequest();\n            }\n\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var product = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (product == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            product.Name = model.Name;\n            product.Description = model.Description;\n            product.Price = model.Price;\n            product.Type = model.Type;\n            product.CategoryId = model.CategoryId;\n            product.SupplierId = model.SupplierId;\n\n            _repository.Update(product);\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Details), new { id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"catalog/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"Product/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var product = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (product == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            ViewBag.CanDelete = _repository.CanDelete(id);\n            return View(product);\n        }\n\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [ActionName(\"Delete\")]\n        [Route(\"catalog/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"Product/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult DeleteConfirmed(int id)\n        {\n            var deleted = _repository.Delete(id);\n            \n            if (!deleted)\n            {\n                var product = _repository.GetById(id);\n                if (product != null)\n                {\n                    ViewBag.CanDelete = false;\n                    ModelState.AddModelError(\"\", \"Cannot delete this product because it has related orders or inventory items.\");\n                    return View(nameof(Delete), product);\n                }\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n    }\n}"}]},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01CRvkRU4NNVbDhM9pAP9e1y__vscode-1779365922556","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

set; } = string.Empty;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Name attribute of the hidden input field that stores the selected ID.\n        /// Example: \"CategoryId\", \"SupplierId\"\n        /// </summary>\n        public string HiddenInputName { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// ID attribute of the hidden input field that stores the selected ID.\n        /// Used as the form field name for model binding.\n        /// </summary>\n        public string HiddenInputId { get; {"timestamp":"2026-05-21T13:35:38.969Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"$(document).ready(function() {\n    // Initialize autocomplete behavior for all inputs marked with data-autocomplete=\"true\"\n    const initAutocomplete = function() {\n        $('[data-autocomplete=\"true\"]').each(function() {\n            const $input = $(this);\n            const searchUrl = $input.data('search-url');\n            const hiddenInputId = $input.data('hidden-input-id');\n            const $hiddenInput = $('#' + hiddenInputId);\n            const suggestionsContainerId = $input.attr('id') + '_suggestions';\n            const $suggestions = $('#' + suggestionsContainerId);\n\n            // Handle input event\n            $input.on('input', function() {\n                const term = $input.val().trim();\n\n                // Clear hidden input if visible input was manually changed\n                if ($hiddenInput.val() && term !== $hiddenInput.data('last-text')) {\n                    $hiddenInput.val('');\n                }\n\n                // Only search if term is at least 2 characters\n                if (term.length < 2) {\n                    $suggestions.empty().hide();\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                // Show loading state\n                $suggestions.html('<div class=\"list-group-item text-muted\"><small>Loading...</small></div>').show();\n\n                // Send AJAX request\n                $.ajax({\n                    url: searchUrl,\n                    data: { term: term },\n                    method: 'GET',\n                    dataType: 'json',\n                    timeout: 5000,\n                    success: function(results) {\n                        renderSuggestions(results);\n                    },\n                    error: function() {\n                        $suggestions.html('<div class=\"list-group-item text-danger\"><small>Error loading results</small></div>').show();\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n\n            // Handle suggestion selection\n            $(document).on('click', '#' + suggestionsContainerId + ' .list-group-item', function() {\n                const $item = $(this);\n                const itemId = $item.data('item-id');\n                const itemText = $item.data('item-text');\n\n                $input.val(itemText);\n                $hiddenInput.val(itemId).data('last-text', itemText);\n                $suggestions.empty().hide();\n\n                // Trigger validation on hidden input\n                $hiddenInput.trigger('blur').trigger('change');\n            });\n\n            // Handle blur event - hide suggestions with slight delay\n            $input.on('blur', function() {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    $suggestions.fadeOut(200);\n                }, 200);\n            });\n\n            // Handle Escape key\n            $input.on('keydown', function(e) {\n                if (e.key === 'Escape') {\n                    $suggestions.empty().hide();\n                }\n            });\n\n            // Helper function to render suggestions\n            function renderSuggestions(results) {\n                if (!results || results.length === 0) {\n                    $suggestions.html('<div class=\"list-group-item text-muted\"><small>No results found</small></div>').show();\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                let html = '';\n                results.forEach(function(item) {\n                    html += `<button type=\"button\" class=\"list-group-item list-group-item-action\" data-item-id=\"${item.id}\" data-item-text=\"${item.text}\">\n                        ${escapeHtml(item.text)}\n                    </button>`;\n                });\n\n                $suggestions.html(html).show();\n            }\n\n            // Helper function to escape HTML special characters\n            function escapeHtml(text) {\n                const div = document.createElement('div');\n                div.textContent = text;\n                return div.innerHTML;\n            }\n        });\n    };\n\n    // Initialize on page load\n    initAutocomplete();\n\n    // Re-initialize if dynamic content is added (e.g., via AJAX)\n    $(document).on('ajaxStop', function() {\n        initAutocomplete();\n    });\n});\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\wwwroot\\js\\autocomplete-dropdown.js"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KqUeym1tExkwwRvNe4Sp4a__vscode-1779365922565","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

term, int maxResults = 50)\n        {\n            var query = _context.Products\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(p => p.Category)\n                .Include(p => p.Supplier);\n\n            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                query = query.Where(p =>\n                    p.Name.Contains(term) ||\n                    p.Description.Contains(term) ||\n                    p.Category.Name.Contains(term) ||\n                    p.Supplier.Name.Contains(term));\n            }\n\n            return query.OrderBy(p => p.Name).Take(maxResults).ToList();\n        }\n    }\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01QEZ5tEQtX6hsi4vVjDSXDH__vscode-1779365922568","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

       public List<Category> Search(string term, int maxResults = 10)\n        {\n            var query = _context.Categories.AsNoTracking();\n\n            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                query = query.Where(c => c.Name.Contains(term));\n            }\n\n            return query.OrderBy(c => c.Name).Take(maxResults).ToList();\n        }\n\n        public void Add(Category category)\n        {\n            _context.Categories.Add(category);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public void Update(Category category)\n        {\n            _context.Categories.Update(category);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public bool Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var category = _context.Categories.FirstOrDefault(c => c.Id == id);\n\n            if (category == null)\n                return false;\n\n            if (!CanDelete(id))\n                return false;\n\n            _context.Categories.Remove(category);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        public bool Exists(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Categories.Any(c => c.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public bool CanDelete(int id)\n        {\n            var category = _context.Categories\n                .Include(c => c.Products)\n                .FirstOrDefault(c => c.Id == id);\n\n            if (category == null)\n                return false;\n\n            return !category.Products.Any();\n        }\n        \n        [Route(\"/categories/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Details(int id)\n        {\n            var category = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (category == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return View(category);\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/categories/create\")]\n        [Route(\"Category/Create\")]\n        public IActionResult Create()\n        {\n            var model = new CategoryFormModel();\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [Route(\"/categories/create\")]\n        [Route(\"Category/Create\")]\n        public IActionResult Create(CategoryFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var category = new Category\n            {\n                Name = model.Name,\n                Description = model.Description\n            };\n\n            _repository.Add(category);\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/categories/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"Category/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id)\n        {\n            var category = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (category == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            var model = new CategoryFormModel\n            {\n                Id = category.Id,\n                Name = category.Name,\n                Description = category.Description\n            };\n\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [Route(\"/categories/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"Category/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id, CategoryFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (id != model.Id)\n            {\n                return BadRequest();\n            }\n\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var category = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (category == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            category.Name = model.Name;\n            category.Description = model.Description;\n\n            _repository.Update(category);\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Details), new { id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/categories/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"Category/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var category = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (category == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            ViewBag.CanDelete = _repository.CanDelete(id);\n            return View(category);\n        }\n\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [ActionName(\"Delete\")]\n        [Route(\"/categories/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"Category/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult DeleteConfirmed(int id)\n        {\n            var deleted = _repository.Delete(id);\n\n            if (!deleted)\n            {\n                var category = _repository.GetById(id);\n                if (category != null)\n                {\n                    ViewBag.CanDelete = false;\n                    ModelState.AddModelError(\"\", \"Cannot delete this category because it is used by one or more products.\");\n                    return View(nameof(Delete), category);\n                }\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n\n        [HttpGet]\n        [Route(\"/categories/search\")]\n        public IActionResult Search(string? term)\n        {\n            var categories = _repository.Search(term);\n            return PartialView(\"_CategoryTableRows\", categories);\n        }\n    }\n}","oldString":"        [Route(\"/categories/{id:int}\")]\n        public        public List<Supplier> Search(string? term, int maxResults = 50)\n        {\n            var query = _context.Suppliers.AsNoTracking();\n\n            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                query = query.Where(s =>\n                    s.Name.Contains(term) ||\n                    s.Address.Contains(term) ||\n                    s.Phone.Contains(term) ||\n                    s.Email.Contains(term) ||\n                    s.ContactPerson.Contains(term));\n            }\n\n            return query.OrderBy(s => s.Name).Take(maxResults).ToList();\n        }\n\n        public void Add(Supplier supplier)\n        {\n            _context.Suppliers.Add(supplier);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public void Update(Supplier supplier)\n        {\n            _context.Suppliers.Update(supplier);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public bool Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var supplier = _context.Suppliers.FirstOrDefault(s => s.Id == id);\n\n            if (supplier == null)\n                return false;\n\n            if (!CanDelete(id))\n                return false;\n\n _context.Suppliers.Any(s => s.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public bool CanDelete(int id)\n        {\n            var supplier = _context.Suppliers\n                .Include(s => s.Products)\n           <small class=\"text-muted ms-1\">Searching...</small>\n              </span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"card-body p-0\">\n          <div Model)\n              </tbody>\n            </table>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n    <script>\n        $(document).ready(function() {\n            let searchTimeout;\n\n            // Handle supplier search input\n            $('#supplierSearchInput').on('input', function() {\n                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n                const term = $(this).val().trim();\n\n                // Show loading indicator\n                $('#supplierSearchLoading').show();\n\n                // Debounce search requests (300ms)\n                searchTimeout = setTimeout(function() {\n                    $.ajax({\n                        url: '/vendors/search',\n                        data: { term: term },\n                        method: 'GET',\n                        timeout: 5000,\n                        success: function(html) {\n                            // Fade out and replace content\n                            $('#supplierTableBody').fadeOut(150, function() {\n                                $(this).html(html).fadeIn(150);\n                            });\n                        },\n                        error: function() {\n                            $('#supplierTableBody').html('<tr><td colspan=\"6\" class=\"text-center text-danger py-4\">Error loading results. Please try again.</td></tr>');\n                        },\n                        complete: function() {\n                            // Hide loading indicator\n                            $('#supplierSearchLoading').hide();\n                        }\n                    });\n                }, 300);\n            });\n\n            // Handle clear button\n            $('#clearSupplierSearch').on('click', function() {\n                $('#supplierSearchInput').val('').focus();\n                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n                $('#supplierSearchLoading').show();\n\n                // Reload all suppliers\n                $.ajax({\n                    url: '/vendors/search',\n                    data: { term: '' },\n                    method: 'GET',\n                    timeout: 5000,\n                    success: function(html) {\n                        $('#supplierTableBody').fadeOut(150, function() {\n                            $(this).html(html).fadeIn(150);\n                        });\n                    },\n                    complete: function() {\n                        $('#supplierSearchLoading').hide();\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n        });\n    </script>\n}","oldString":"  <!-- Supplier list -->\n  <div class=\"row\">\n    <div GetById(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Warehouses\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(w => w.InventoryItems)\n                    .ThenInclude(ii => ii.Product)\n                .FirstOrDefault(w => w.Id == id);\n        }\n    }\n}","newString":"        public Warehouse? GetById(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Warehouses\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(w => w.InventoryItems)\n                    .ThenInclude(ii => ii.Product)\n                .FirstOrDefault(w => w.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public void Add(Warehouse warehouse)\n        {\n            _context.Warehouses.Add(warehouse);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public void Update(Warehouse warehouse)\n        {\n            _context.Warehouses.Update(warehouse);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public bool Delete(int id)\n        {\n            if (!Exists(id))\n                return false;\n\n            if (!CanDelete(id))\n                return false;\n\n            var warehouse = _context.Warehouses.Find(id);\n            if (warehouse != null)\n            {\n                _context.Warehouses.Remove(warehouse);\n                _context.SaveChanges();\n                return true;\n            }\n\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        public bool Exists(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Warehouses.Any(w => w.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public bool CanDelete(int id)\n        {\n            var warehouse = _context.Warehouses\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(w => w.InventoryItems)\n                .FirstOrDefault(w => w.Id == id);\n\n            if (warehouse == null)\n                return false;\n\n            return !warehouse.InventoryItems.Any();\n        }\n\n        public List<Warehouse> Search(string? term, int maxResults = 50)\n        {\n            var query = _context.Warehouses.AsNoTracking().Include(w => w.InventoryItems);\n\n            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                return query\n                    .OrderBy(w => w.Name)\n                    .Take(maxResults)\n                    .ToList();\n            }\n\n            term = term.ToLower();\n            return query\n                .Where(w =>\n                    w.Name.ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                    w.Address.ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                    w.Phone.ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                    w.Email.ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                    w.Manager.ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                    w.Type.ToString().ToLower().Contains(term))\n                .OrderBy(w => w.Name)\n                .Take(maxResults)\n                .ToList();\n        }\n    }\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01EHc8y426tpPipqsQzB4e83__vscode-1779365922607","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

       [Route(\"/storage/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Details(int id)\n        {\n            var warehouse = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (warehouse == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return View(warehouse);\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/storage/create\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Create()\n        {\n            var model = new WarehouseFormModel\n            {\n                OpeningDate = DateTime.Today,\n                IsActive = true\n            };\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/storage/create\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult Create(WarehouseFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var warehouse = new Warehouse\n            {\n                Name = model.Name,\n                Address = model.Address,\n                Capacity = model.Capacity,\n                Phone = model.Phone,\n                Email = model.Email,\n                Manager = model.Manager,\n                OpeningDate = model.OpeningDate,\n                IsActive = model.IsActive,\n                Type = model.Type\n            };\n\n            _repository.Add(warehouse);\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Warehouse\", action = \"Details\", id = warehouse.Id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/storage/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id)\n        {\n            var warehouse = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (warehouse == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            var model = new WarehouseFormModel\n            {\n                Id = warehouse.Id,\n                Name = warehouse.Name,\n                Address = warehouse.Address,\n                Capacity = warehouse.Capacity,\n                Phone = warehouse.Phone,\n                Email = warehouse.Email,\n                Manager = warehouse.Manager,\n                OpeningDate = warehouse.OpeningDate,\n                IsActive = warehouse.IsActive,\n                Type = warehouse.Type\n            };\n\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/storage/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id, WarehouseFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (id != model.Id)\n            {\n                return BadRequest();\n            }\n\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var warehouse = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (warehouse == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            warehouse.Name = model.Name;\n            warehouse.Address = model.Address;\n            warehouse.Capacity = model.Capacity;\n            warehouse.Phone = model.Phone;\n            warehouse.Email = model.Email;\n            warehouse.Manager = model.Manager;\n            warehouse.OpeningDate = model.OpeningDate;\n            warehouse.IsActive = model.IsActive;\n            warehouse.Type = model.Type;\n\n            _repository.Update(warehouse);\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Warehouse\", action = \"Details\", id = warehouse.Id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/storage/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var warehouse = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (warehouse == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            ViewBag.CanDelete = _repository.CanDelete(id);\n            return View(warehouse);\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/storage/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ActionName(\"Delete\")]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult DeleteConfirmed(int id)\n        {\n            var warehouse = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (warehouse == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            if (!_repository.Delete(id))\n            {\n                ViewBag.CanDelete = false;\n                ModelState.AddModelError(\"\", \"Cannot delete this warehouse because it is currently used by one or more inventory items. Please remove all inventory items from this warehouse before attempting to delete it.\");\n                return View(\"Delete\", warehouse);\n            }\n\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Warehouse\", action = \"Index\" });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/storage/search\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Search(string? term)\n        {\n            var warehouses = _repository.Search(term);\n            return PartialView(\"_WarehouseTableRows\", warehouses);\n        }\n\n        // Legacy routes for backward compatibility\n        [Route(\"/Warehouse\")]\n        [Route(\"/Warehouse/Index\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyIndex()\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Warehouse\", action = \"Index\" });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/Warehouse/Details/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyDetails(int id)\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Warehouse\", action = \"Details\", id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/Warehouse/Create\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyCreate()\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Warehouse\", action = \"Create\" });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/Warehouse/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyEdit(int id)\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Warehouse\", action = \"Edit\", id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/Warehouse/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyDelete(int id)\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Warehouse\", action = \"Delete\", id });\n        }\n    }\n}","oldString":"        [Route(\"/storage/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Details(int id)\n        {\n            var warehouse = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (warehouse == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return View(warehouse);\n        }\n    }\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01SxjuXATiDZsReRH9ifPaDw__vscode-1779365922610","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

GetById(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Users\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(u => u.Orders)\n                .FirstOrDefault(u => u.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public void Add(User user)\n        {\n            _context.Users.Add(user);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public void Update(User user)\n        {\n            _context.Users.Update(user);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public bool Delete(int id)\n        {\n            if (!Exists(id))\n                return false;\n\n            if (!CanDelete(id))\n                return false;\n\n            var user = _context.Users.Find(id);\n            if (user != null)\n            {\n                _context.Users.Remove(user);\n                _context.SaveChanges();\n                return true;\n            }\n\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        public bool Exists(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Users.Any(u => u.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public bool CanDelete(int id)\n        {\n            var user = _context.Users\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(u => u.Orders)\n                .FirstOrDefault(u => u.Id == id);\n\n            if (user == null)\n                return false;\n\n            return !user.Orders.Any();\n        }\n\n        public List<User> Search(string? term, int maxResults = 50)\n        {\n            var query = _context.Users.AsNoTracking().Include(u => u.Orders);\n\n            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                return query\n                    .OrderBy(u => u.LastName)\n                    .ThenBy(u => u.FirstName)\n                    .Take(maxResults)\n                    .ToList();\n            }\n\n            term = term.ToLower();\n            return query\n                .Where(u =>\n                    u.FirstName.ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                    u.LastName.ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                    u.Email.ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                    u.Role.ToString().ToLower().Contains(term))\n                .OrderBy(u => u.LastName)\n                .ThenBy(u => u.FirstName)\n                .Take(maxResults)\n                .ToList();\n        }\n    }\n}","oldString":"        public User?       [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult Create(UserFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var user = new User\n            {\n                FirstName = model.FirstName,\n                LastName = model.LastName,\n                Email = model.Email,\n                Role = model.Role,\n                RegistrationDate = model.RegistrationDate,\n                IsActive = model.IsActive\n            };\n\n            _repository.Add(user);\n            return id)\n        {\n            var user = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (user == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            var model = new UserFormModel\n            {\n                Id = user.Id,\n                FirstName = user.FirstName,\n                LastName = user.LastName,\n                Email = user.Email,\n [Route(\"/users/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id, UserFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (id != model.Id)\n            {\n                return BadRequest();\n            }\n\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var user = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (user == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            user.FirstName = model.FirstName;\n            user.LastName = model.LastName;\n            user.Email = model.Email;\n            user.Role = model.Role;\n            user.RegistrationDate = model.RegistrationDate;\n            user.IsActive = model.IsActive;\n\n            _repository.Update(user);\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"User\", action = \"Details\", id = user.Id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/users/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var user = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (user == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            ViewBag.CanDelete = _repository.CanDelete(id);\n            return View(user);\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/users/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ActionName(\"Delete\")]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult DeleteConfirmed(int id)\n        {\n            var user = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (user == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            if (!_repository.Delete(id))\n            {\n                ViewBag.CanDelete = false;\n                ModelState.AddModelError(\"\", \"Cannot delete this user because they have placed one or more orders. Please contact administration if this user needs to be removed.\");\n                return View(\"Delete\", user);\n            }\n\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"User\", action = \"Index\" });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/users/search\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Search(string? term)\n        {\n            var users = _repository.Search(term);\n            return PartialView(\"_UserTableRows\", users);\n        }\n\n        // Legacy routes for backward compatibility\n        [Route(\"/User\")]\n        [Route(\"/User/Index\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyIndex()\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"User\", action = \"Index\" });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/User/Details/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyDetails(int id)\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"User\", action = \"Details\", id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/User/Create\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyCreate()\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"User\", action = \"Create\" });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/User/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyEdit(int id)\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"User\", action = \"Edit\", id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/User/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyDelete(int id)\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"User\", action = \"Delete\", id });\n        }\n    }\n}","oldString":"        public IActionResult Index()\n        {\n            var users = _repository.GetAll();\n            return View(users);\n        }\n\n        public IActionResult Details(int id)\n        {\n            var user = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (user == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return View(user);\n        }\n    }\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01MyP4CYaGqsoYbe6Be6nDwT__vscode-1779365922627","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T15:13:18.123Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"replace_string_in_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\Views\\User\\Index.cshtml","newString":"<footer class=\"mt-4 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center small text-muted\">\n    <div>Last updated: @DateTime.Now.ToString(\"f\")</div>\n    <div>\n        <a asp-controller=\"Home\" asp-action=\"Index\" class=\"text-decoration-none\">Back to Dashboard</a>\n    </div>\n</footer>\n\n@section Scripts {\n    <script>\n        $(document).ready(function() {\n            let searchTimeout;\n\n            // Handle user search input\n            $('#userSearchInput').on('input', function() {\n                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n                const term = $(this).val().trim();\n\n                // Show loading indicator\n                $('#userSearchLoading').show();\n\n                // Debounce search requests (300ms)\n                searchTimeout = setTimeout(function() {\n                    $.ajax({\n                        url: '/users/search',\n                        data: { term: term },\n                        method: 'GET',\n                        timeout: 5000,\n                        success: function(html) {\n                            // Fade out and replace content\n                            $('#userTableBody').fadeOut(150, function() {\n                                $(this).html(html).fadeIn(150);\n                            });\n                        },\n                        error: function() {\n                            $('#userTableBody').html('<tr><td colspan=\"6\" class=\"text-center text-danger py-4\">Error loading results. GetById(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Orders\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(o => o.User)\n                .Include(o => o.OrderItems)\n                    .ThenInclude(oi => oi.Product)\n                .FirstOrDefault(o => o.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public void Add(Order order)\n        {\n            _context.Orders.Add(order);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public void Update(Order order)\n        {\n            _context.Orders.Update(order);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public bool Delete(int id)\n        {\n            if (!Exists(id))\n                return false;\n\n            if (!CanDelete(id))\n                return false;\n\n            var order = _context.Orders.Find(id);\n            if (order != null)\n            {\n                _context.Orders.Remove(order);\n                _context.SaveChanges();\n                return true;\n            }\n\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        public bool Exists(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Orders.Any(o => o.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public bool CanDelete(int id)\n        {\n            var order = _context.Orders\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(o => o.OrderItems)\n                .FirstOrDefault(o => o.Id == id);\n\n            if (order == null)\n                return false;\n\n            return !order.OrderItems.Any();\n        }\n\n        public List<Order> Search(string? term, int maxResults = 50)\n        {\n            var query = _context.Orders.AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(o => o.User)\n                .Include(o => o.OrderItems);\n\n            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                return query\n                    .OrderByDescending(o => o.OrderDate)\n                    .Take(maxResults)\n                    .ToList();\n            }\n\n            term = term.ToLower();\n            return query\n                .Where(o =>\n                    o.OrderNumber.ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                    o.Note.ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                    o.Status.ToString().ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                    (o.User != null && (\n                        o.User.FirstName.ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                        o.User.LastName.ToLower().Contains(term) ||\n                        o.User.Email.ToLower().Contains(term))))\n                .OrderByDescending(o => o.OrderDate)\n                .Take(maxResults)\n                .ToList();\n        }\n    }\n}","oldString":"        public Order?        [Route(\"/orders/{id:int}/summary\")]\n        public IActionResult Details(int id)\n        {\n            var order = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (order == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return View(order);\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/orders/create\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Create()\n        {\n            var model = new OrderFormModel\n            {\n                OrderDate = DateTime.Today,\n                Status = OrderStatus.Pending\n            };\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/orders/create\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult Create(OrderFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var order = new Order\n            {\n                OrderNumber = model.OrderNumber,\n                OrderDate = model.OrderDate,\n                TotalPrice = model.TotalPrice,\n                Status = model.Status,\n                DeliveryDate = model.DeliveryDate,\n                Note = model.Note,\n                UserId = model.UserId.Value\n            };\n\n            _repository.Add(order);\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Order\", action = \"Details\", id = order.Id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/orders/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id)\n        {\n            var order = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (order == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            var model = new OrderFormModel\n            {\n                Id = order.Id,\n                OrderNumber = order.OrderNumber,\n                OrderDate = order.OrderDate,\n                TotalPrice = order.TotalPrice,\n                Status = order.Status,\n                DeliveryDate = order.DeliveryDate,\n                Note = order.Note,\n                UserId = order.UserId,\n                UserDisplayName = order.User != null \n                    ? $\"{order.User.FirstName} {order.User.LastName} ({order.User.Email})\" \n                    : null\n            };\n\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/orders/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id, OrderFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (id != model.Id)\n            {\n                return BadRequest();\n            }\n\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var order = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (order == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            order.OrderNumber = model.OrderNumber;\n            order.OrderDate = model.OrderDate;\n            order.TotalPrice = model.TotalPrice;\n            order.Status = model.Status;\n            order.DeliveryDate = model.DeliveryDate;\n            order.Note = model.Note;\n            order.UserId = model.UserId.Value;\n\n            _repository.Update(order);\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Order\", action = \"Details\", id = order.Id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/orders/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var order = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (order == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            ViewBag.CanDelete = _repository.CanDelete(id);\n            return View(order);\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/orders/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ActionName(\"Delete\")]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult DeleteConfirmed(int id)\n        {\n            var order = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (order == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            if (!_repository.Delete(id))\n            {\n                ViewBag.CanDelete = false;\n                ModelState.AddModelError(\"\", \"Cannot delete this order because it contains one or more order items. Please remove all items from this order before attempting to delete it.\");\n                return View(\"Delete\", order);\n            }\n\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Order\", action = \"Index\" });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/orders/search\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Search(string? term)\n        {\n            var orders = _repository.Search(term);\n            return PartialView(\"_OrderTableRows\", orders);\n        }\n\n        // Legacy routes for backward compatibility\n        [Route(\"/Order\")]\n        [Route(\"/Order/Index\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyIndex()\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Order\", action = \"Index\" });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/Order/Details/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyDetails(int id)\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Order\", action = \"Details\", id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/Order/Create\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyCreate()\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Order\", action = \"Create\" });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/Order/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyEdit(int id)\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Order\", action = \"Edit\", id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/Order/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult LegacyDelete(int id)\n        {\n            return RedirectToRoute(new { controller = \"Order\", action = \"Delete\", id });\n        }\n    }\n}","oldString":"        [Route(\"/orders/{id:int}/summary\")]\n        public IActionResult Details(int id)\n        {\n            var order = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (order == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return View(order);\n        }\n    }\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01CBKyoKHgPp3UqKrGQq2LDn__vscode-1779365922645","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

switch\n    {\n        OrderStatus.Pending => \"badge bg-warning text-dark\",\n        OrderStatus.Processing => \"badge bg-info text-white\",\n        OrderStatus.Delivered => \"badge bg-success\",\n                                <div class=\"fs-6\">@(Model != null ? Value { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the placeholder text shown when input is empty.\n        /// </summary>\n        public string Placeholder { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the help text displayed below the input field for user guidance.\n        /// </summary>\n        public string HelpText { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets a value indicating whether the time component should be included in the input.\n        /// If true, renders datetime-local input; if false, renders date input only.\n        /// </summary>\n        public bool IncludeTime { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets a value indicating whether this input field is required.\n        /// </summary>\n        public bool IsRequired { get; set; }\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01GmYoRhhjD3Wh2m35X1neDa__vscode-1779365922657","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T15:44:52.471Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"@using InventoryManagement.ViewModels.Shared\n@model DateTimeInputModel\n\n@{\n    // Format the DateTime value for the hidden input\n    string formattedValue = string.Empty;\n    if (Model?.Value.HasValue == true)\n    {\n        formattedValue = Model.IncludeTime \n            ? Model.Value.Value.ToString(\"yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm\")\n            : Model.Value.Value.ToString(\"yyyy-MM-dd\");\n    }\n\n    // Format the DateTime value for display in the visible input\n    string displayValue = string.Empty;\n    if (Model?.Value.HasValue == true)\n    {\n        displayValue = Model.IncludeTime\n            ? Model.Value.Value.ToString(\"dd MMM yyyy HH:mm\")\n            : Model.Value.Value.ToString(\"dd MMM yyyy\");\n    }\n}\n\n<div class=\"mb-3\">\n    <!-- Label -->\n    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model?.Label))\n    {\n        <label for=\"@Model.InputId\" class=\"form-label\">\n            @Model.Label\n            @if (Model?.IsRequired == true)\n            {\n                <span class=\"text-danger\">*</span>\n            }\n        </label>\n    }\n\n    <!-- Visible Text Input (for user interaction) -->\n    <input \n        type=\"text\"\n        class=\"form-control custom-date-display\"\n        id=\"@(Model?.InputId)_display\"\n        placeholder=\"@(Model?.Placeholder ?? (Model?.IncludeTime == true ? \"DD MMM YYYY HH:MM\" : \"DD MMM YYYY\"))\"\n        autocomplete=\"off\"\n        data-date-input=\"true\"\n        data-hidden-input-id=\"@Model?.InputId\"\n        data-include-time=\"@(Model?.IncludeTime.ToString().ToLower() ?? \"false\")\"\n        value=\"@displayValue\"\n        @(Model?.IsRequired == true ? \"required\" : \"\") />\n\n    <!-- Hidden Input (for model binding) -->\n    <input\n        type=\"hidden\"\n        name=\"@Model?.InputName\"\n        id=\"@Model?.InputId\"\n        value=\"@formattedValue\" />\n\n    <!-- Validation Message -->\n    <span class=\"invalid-feedback d-block\"\n          data-valmsg-for=\"@Model?.InputName\"\n          data-valmsg-replace=\"true\"></span>\n\n    <!-- Help Text -->\n    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model?.HelpText))\n    {\n        <small class=\"form-text text-muted d-block mt-1\">@Model.HelpText</small>\n    }\n</div>\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\Views\\Shared\\_DateTimeInput.cshtml"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01DVo2JRve6V3Cu9EKcGA3Uz__vscode-1779365922658","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T15:45:17.688Z","hook_event_name":"UserPromptSubmit","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","prompt":"I am working on Lab 4 for my ASP.NET Core MVC InventoryManagement application.\r\n\r\nCreate only this file:\r\nInventoryManagement/wwwroot/js/custom-date-input.js\r\n\r\nTask:\r\nCreate custom JavaScript behavior for the reusable custom date/time input partial.\r\n\r\nRequirements:\r\n- Use plain JavaScript or jQuery.\r\n- Initialize all inputs with data-date-input=\"true\".\r\n- Do not use browser native datepicker.\r\n- Detect browser language using navigator.language.\r\n- If language starts with \"hr\", display date as:\r\n  dd.MM.yyyy.\r\n- Otherwise display date as:\r\n  MM/dd/yyyy\r\n- If IncludeTime is true:\r\n  Croatian display format should be dd.MM.yyyy. HH:mm\r\n  English display format should be MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm\r\n- Hidden input should always store:\r\n  yyyy-MM-dd for date only\r\n  yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm for date and time\r\n- On page load, read hidden value and format visible input.\r\n- On visible input change or blur, parse user input and update hidden input.\r\n- If parsing fails, add Bootstrap invalid styling to visible input.\r\n- If parsing succeeds, remove invalid styling.\r\n- Trigger change and validation on hidden input after updating it.\r\n- Add simple placeholder text depending on browser language and IncludeTime.\r\n- Keep code simple and readable.\r\n- Do not modify other files.","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T15:45:41.794Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"(function() {\n    'use strict';\n\n    /**\n     * Detects browser language\n     */\n    function getBrowserLanguage() {\n        return navigator.language || navigator.userLanguage || 'en-US';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Checks if browser language is Croatian\n     */\n    function isCroatian() {\n        return getBrowserLanguage().startsWith('hr');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Formats an ISO datetime string to display format\n     * ISO format: yyyy-MM-dd or yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm\n     */\n    function formatDateForDisplay(isoString, includeTime) {\n        if (!isoString || !isoString.trim()) {\n            return '';\n        }\n\n        try {\n            let parts;\n            let day, month, year, hours = 0, minutes = 0;\n\n            if (includeTime && isoString.includes('T')) {\n                // Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm\n                const [datePart, timePart] = isoString.split('T');\n                const [y, m, d] = datePart.split('-');\n                const [h, min] = timePart.split(':');\n\n                day = parseInt(d, 10);\n                month = parseInt(m, 10);\n                year = parseInt(y, 10);\n                hours = parseInt(h, 10);\n                minutes = parseInt(min, 10);\n            } else {\n                // Format: yyyy-MM-dd\n                const [y, m, d] = isoString.split('-');\n                day = parseInt(d, 10);\n                month = parseInt(m, 10);\n                year = parseInt(y, 10);\n            }\n\n            const dayStr = String(day).padStart(2, '0');\n            const monthStr = String(month).padStart(2, '0');\n            const hoursStr = String(hours).padStart(2, '0');\n            const minutesStr = String(minutes).padStart(2, '0');\n\n            if (isCroatian()) {\n                return includeTime\n                    ? `${dayStr}.${monthStr}.${year}. ${hoursStr}:${minutesStr}`\n                    : `${dayStr}.${monthStr}.${year}.`;\n            } else {\n                return includeTime\n                    ? `${monthStr}/${dayStr}/${year} ${hoursStr}:${minutesStr}`\n                    : `${monthStr}/${dayStr}/${year}`;\n            }\n        } catch (e) {\n            return '';\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Parses display format input to ISO format\n     * Handles both Croatian and English formats with optional time\n     */\n    function parseDisplayToIso(displayString, includeTime) {\n        if (!displayString || !displayString.trim()) {\n            return '';\n        }\n\n        const input = displayString.trim();\n        let day, month, year, hours = 0, minutes = 0;\n\n        try {\n            if (isCroatian()) {\n                // Croatian format: dd.MM.yyyy. [HH:mm]\n                const regex = includeTime\n                    ? /^(\\d{1,2})\\.(\\d{1,2})\\.(\\d{4})\\.?\\s+(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{1,2})$/\n                    : /^(\\d{1,2})\\.(\\d{1,2})\\.(\\d{4})\\.?$/;\n\n                const match = input.match(regex);\n                if (!match) return '';\n\n                day = parseInt(match[1], 10);\n                month = parseInt(match[2], 10);\n                year = parseInt(match[3], 10);\n                if (includeTime) {\n                    hours = parseInt(match[4], 10);\n                    minutes = parseInt(match[5], 10);\n                }\n            } else {\n                // English format: MM/dd/yyyy [HH:mm]\n                const regex = includeTime\n                    ? /^(\\d{1,2})\\/(\\d{1,2})\\/(\\d{4})\\s+(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{1,2})$/\n                    : /^(\\d{1,2})\\/(\\d{1,2})\\/(\\d{4})$/;\n\n                const match = input.match(regex);\n                if (!match) return '';\n\n                month = parseInt(match[1], 10);\n                day = parseInt(match[2], 10);\n                year = parseInt(match[3], 10);\n                if (includeTime) {\n                    hours = parseInt(match[4], 10);\n                    minutes = parseInt(match[5], 10);\n                }\n            }\n\n            // Validate date values\n            if (month < 1 || month > 12 || day < 1 || day > 31) {\n                return '';\n            }\n\n            if (year < 1900 || year > 2100) {\n                return '';\n            }\n\n            // Validate actual day exists in month\n            const testDate = new Date(year, month - 1, day);\n            if (testDate.getDate() !== day || testDate.getMonth() !== month - 1) {\n                return '';\n            }\n\n            // Validate time values\n            if (hours < 0 || hours > 23 || minutes < 0 || minutes > 59) {\n                return '';\n            }\n\n            // Format as ISO\n            const dayStr = String(day).padStart(2, '0');\n            const monthStr = String(month).padStart(2, '0');\n            const hoursStr = String(hours).padStart(2, '0');\n            const minutesStr = String(minutes).padStart(2, '0');\n\n            if (includeTime) {\n                return `${year}-${monthStr}-${dayStr}T${hoursStr}:${minutesStr}`;\n            } else {\n                return `${year}-${monthStr}-${dayStr}`;\n            }\n        } catch (e) {\n            return '';\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Initializes all custom date/time inputs on the page\n     */\n    function initCustomDateInputs() {\n        const inputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[data-date-input=\"true\"]');\n\n        inputs.forEach(function(visibleInput) {\n            const hiddenInputId = visibleInput.getAttribute('data-hidden-input-id');\n            const includeTimeStr = visibleInput.getAttribute('data-include-time');\n            const includeTime = includeTimeStr === 'true';\n\n            if (!hiddenInputId) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            const hiddenInput = document.getElementById(hiddenInputId);\n            if (!hiddenInput) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            // On page load, format the visible input from hidden value\n            if (hiddenInput.value) {\n                visibleInput.value = formatDateForDisplay(hiddenInput.value, includeTime);\n            }\n\n            // On blur, parse visible input and update hidden input\n            visibleInput.addEventListener('blur', function() {\n                const displayValue = visibleInput.value;\n\n                if (displayValue.trim() === '') {\n                    // Empty input is allowed\n                    hiddenInput.value = '';\n                    visibleInput.classList.remove('is-invalid');\n                } else {\n                    const isoValue = parseDisplayToIso(displayValue, includeTime);\n\n                    if (isoValue) {\n                        // Valid parse\n                        hiddenInput.value = isoValue;\n                        visibleInput.classList.remove('is-invalid');\n                        // Trigger change and validation events\n                        hiddenInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));\n                    } else {\n                        // Invalid parse\n                        visibleInput.classList.add('is-invalid');\n                    }\n                }\n            });\n\n            // On input, remove invalid class while user is typing\n            visibleInput.addEventListener('input', function() {\n                if (visibleInput.value.trim() === '') {\n                    visibleInput.classList.remove('is-invalid');\n                }\n            });\n        });\n    }\n\n    // Initialize on DOM ready\n    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initCustomDateInputs);\n    } else {\n        // DOM already loaded\n        initCustomDateInputs();\n    }\n\n    // Also support if loaded after DOM is ready (e.g., dynamic content)\n    if (typeof jQuery !== 'undefined') {\n        jQuery(document).ready(initCustomDateInputs);\n    }\n})();\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\wwwroot\\js\\custom-date-input.js"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01EbTsVvamHpnKvmKMNEQaJt__vscode-1779365922659","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T23:06:57.775Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;\n\nnamespace InventoryManagement.ViewModels.InventoryItem\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Form model for InventoryItem Create/Edit operations.\n    /// Represents the user input for managing inventory items in warehouses.\n    /// </summary>\n    public class InventoryItemFormModel\n    {\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the unique identifier for the inventory item.\n        /// </summary>\n        public int Id { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the minimum quantity threshold for reordering.\n        /// Must be between 0 and 1,000,000 units.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Range(0, 1000000, ErrorMessage = \"Minimum quantity must be between 0 and 1,000,000.\")]\n        public int MinimumQuantity { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the shelf location or storage designation for this item.\n        /// Optional, maximum 50 characters.\n        /// </summary>\n        [StringLength(50, ErrorMessage = \"Shelf location cannot exceed 50 characters.\")]\n        public string ShelfLocation { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the date and time when this inventory item was last checked/audited.\n        /// Required field.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Required(ErrorMessage = \"Last checked date is required.\")]\n        public DateTime LastCheckedAt { get; GetById(int id)\r\n  void Add(InventoryItem inventoryItem)\r\n  void Update(InventoryItem inventoryItem)\r\n  bool Delete(int id)\r\n  bool Exists(int id)\r\n  bool CanDelete(int id)\r\n  List<InventoryItem> Search(string? term, int maxResults = 50)\r\n\r\nBehavior:\r\n- GetAll should Include Product and Warehouse, use AsNoTracking, order by Product.Name then Warehouse.Name.\r\n- GetById should Include Product and Warehouse.\r\n- Add/Update/Delete should call SaveChanges().\r\n- Delete should return false if item does not exist.\r\n- CanDelete should return true only if item exists.\r\n- Search should include Product and Warehouse.\r\n- If term is empty, return first maxResults ordered by Product.Name then Warehouse.Name.\r\n- If term has value, search by:\r\n  Product.Name\r\n  Warehouse.Name\r\n  ShelfLocation\r\n- Use IQueryable<InventoryItem> query to avoid Include/Where type issues.\r\n- Do not modify other files.","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T23:07:53.933Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"using InventoryManagement.Domain.Models;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace InventoryManagement.DAL.Repositories\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Entity Framework repository for InventoryItem CRUD operations and search.\n    /// Manages inventory item records in warehouse locations.\n    /// </summary>\n    public class InventoryItemEfRepository\n    {\n        private readonly InventoryManagementDbContext _context;\n\n        public InventoryItemEfRepository(InventoryManagementDbContext context)\n        {\n            _context = context;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets all inventory items from the database.\n        /// Includes related Product and Warehouse entities.\n        /// Returns no-tracking query for read-only operations.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <returns>List of all inventory items ordered by Product name, then Warehouse name.</returns>\n        public List<InventoryItem> GetAll()\n        {\n            return _context.InventoryItems\n                .Include(ii => ii.Product)\n                .Include(ii => ii.Warehouse)\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .OrderBy(ii => ii.Product!.Name)\n                .ThenBy(ii => ii.Warehouse!.Name)\n                .ToList();\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets a single inventory item by ID.\n        /// Includes related Product and Warehouse entities.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"id\">The inventory item ID.</param>\n        /// <returns>The inventory item if found; otherwise null.</returns>\n        public InventoryItem? GetById(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.InventoryItems\n                .Include(ii => ii.Product)\n                .Include(ii => ii.Warehouse)\n                .FirstOrDefault(ii => ii.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Adds a new inventory item to the database.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"inventoryItem\">The inventory item to add.</param>\n        public void Add(InventoryItem inventoryItem)\n        {\n            _context.InventoryItems.Add(inventoryItem);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Updates an existing inventory item in the database.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"inventoryItem\">The inventory item with updated values.</param>\n        public void Update(InventoryItem inventoryItem)\n        {\n            _context.InventoryItems.Update(inventoryItem);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Deletes an inventory item from the database.\n        /// Returns false if the item does not exist.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"id\">The ID of the inventory item to delete.</param>\n        /// <returns>True if deletion succeeded; false if item not found.</returns>\n        public bool Delete(int id)\n        {\n            if (!Exists(id))\n            {\n                return false;\n            }\n\n            var inventoryItem = _context.InventoryItems.Find(id);\n            if (inventoryItem != null)\n            {\n                _context.InventoryItems.Remove(inventoryItem);\n                _context.SaveChanges();\n                return true;\n            }\n\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Checks if an inventory item exists by ID.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"id\">The inventory item ID.</param>\n        /// <returns>True if the item exists; otherwise false.</returns>\n        public bool Exists(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.InventoryItems.Any(ii => ii.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Checks if an inventory item can be deleted.\n        /// Currently, inventory items can always be deleted (no dependent entities).\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"id\">The inventory item ID.</param>\n        /// <returns>True if the item exists and can be deleted; otherwise false.</returns>\n        public bool CanDelete(int id)\n        {\n            return Exists(id);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Searches for inventory items by term.\n        /// If term is empty, returns the first maxResults items ordered by Product name then Warehouse name.\n        /// If term has value, searches by Product name, Warehouse name, and Shelf location (case-insensitive).\n        /// Includes related Product and Warehouse entities.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"term\">The search term (optional).</param>\n        /// <param name=\"maxResults\">The maximum number of results to return (default 50).</param>\n        /// <returns>List of inventory items matching the search criteria.</returns>\n        public List<InventoryItem> Search(string? term, int maxResults = 50)\n        {\n            IQueryable<InventoryItem> query = _context.InventoryItems\n                .Include(ii => ii.Product)\n                .Include(ii => ii.Warehouse);\n\n            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                // No search term: return first maxResults ordered by Product name, then Warehouse name\n                return query\n                    .OrderBy(ii => ii.Product!.Name)\n                    .ThenBy(ii => ii.Warehouse!.Name)\n                    .Take(maxResults)\n                    .ToList();\n            }\n\n            // Search term provided: filter by Product name, Warehouse name, or Shelf location\n            var searchTerm = term.ToLower();\n            return query\n                .Where(ii =>\n                    ii.Product!.Name.ToLower().Contains(searchTerm) ||\n                    ii.Warehouse!.Name.ToLower().Contains(searchTerm) ||\n                    ii.ShelfLocation.ToLower().Contains(searchTerm))\n                .OrderBy(ii => ii.Product!.Name)\n                .ThenBy(ii => ii.Warehouse!.Name)\n                .Take(maxResults)\n                .ToList();\n        }\n    }\n}\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement.DAL\\Repositories\\InventoryItemEfRepository.cs"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XtgLBudiXFhB5mFU2B2G8u__vscode-1779365922663","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

delete if needed.\r\n- Do not create separate legacy redirect actions.\r\n\r\nRoutes:\r\nIndex:\r\n- /inventory\r\n- /InventoryItem\r\n- /InventoryItem/Index\r\n\r\nDetails:\r\n- /InventoryItem/Edit/{id:int}\r\n\r\nDelete:\r\n- /inventory/{id:int}/delete\r\n- /InventoryItem/Delete/{id:int}\r\n\r\nSearch:\r\n- /inventory/search\r\n\r\nMapping rules:\r\nCreate GET:\r\n- return new InventoryItemFormModel with LastCheckedAt = DateTime.Now.\r\n\r\nCreate POST:\r\n- map InventoryItemFormModel to InventoryItem.\r\n- set ProductId from model.ProductId.Value.\r\n- set WarehouseId from model.WarehouseId.Value.\r\n- call _repository.Add.\r\n- redirect to Details.\r\n\r\nEdit GET:\r\n- find item by id.\r\n- if null return NotFound.\r\n- map InventoryItem to
