_repository.CanDelete(id).\r\n- return Delete view.\r\n\r\nDelete POST:\r\n- call Delete(id).\r\n- if false, redisplay with error.\r\n- if true, redirect to Index.\r\n\r\nSearch:\r\n- call _repository.Search(term).\r\n- return PartialView(\"_InventoryItemTableRows\", items).","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T23:09:12.974Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\nusing InventoryManagement.DAL.Repositories;\nusing InventoryManagement.Domain.Models;\nusing InventoryManagement.ViewModels.InventoryItem;\n\nnamespace InventoryManagement.Controllers\n{\n    public class InventoryItemController : Controller\n    {\n        private readonly InventoryItemEfRepository _repository;\n\n        public InventoryItemController(InventoryItemEfRepository repository)\n        {\n            _repository = repository;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Displays list of all inventory items.\n        /// Supports both semantic (/inventory) and legacy (/InventoryItem) routes.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/inventory\")]\n        [Route(\"/InventoryItem\")]\n        [Route(\"/InventoryItem/Index\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Index()\n        {\n            var items = _repository.GetAll();\n            return View(items);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Displays details for a specific inventory item.\n        /// Supports both semantic (/inventory/{id}) and legacy (/InventoryItem/Details/{id}) routes.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/inventory/{id:int}\")]\n        [Route(\"/InventoryItem/Details/{id:int}\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Details(int id)\n        {\n            var item = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (item == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return View(item);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Displays the create form for a new inventory item.\n        /// Initializes LastCheckedAt to current date/time.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/inventory/create\")]\n        [Route(\"/InventoryItem/Create\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Create()\n        {\n            var model = new InventoryItemFormModel\n            {\n                LastCheckedAt = DateTime.Now\n            };\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Processes creation of a new inventory item.\n        /// Maps form model to domain model and saves to database.\n        /// Redirects to Details on success.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/inventory/create\")]\n        [Route(\"/InventoryItem/Create\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult Create(InventoryItemFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var inventoryItem = new InventoryItem\n            {\n                QuantityInStock = model.QuantityInStock,\n                MinimumQuantity = model.MinimumQuantity,\n                MaximumQuantity = model.MaximumQuantity,\n                ShelfLocation = model.ShelfLocation,\n                LastCheckedAt = model.LastCheckedAt,\n                ProductId = model.ProductId.Value,\n                WarehouseId = model.WarehouseId.Value\n            };\n\n            _repository.Add(inventoryItem);\n            return RedirectToAction(\"Details\", new { id = inventoryItem.Id });\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Displays the edit form for an existing inventory item.\n        /// Populates display names from related Product and Warehouse.\n        /// Returns NotFound if item doesn't exist.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/inventory/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"/InventoryItem/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id)\n        {\n            var item = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (item == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            var model = new InventoryItemFormModel\n            {\n                Id = item.Id,\n                QuantityInStock = item.QuantityInStock,\n                MinimumQuantity = item.MinimumQuantity,\n                MaximumQuantity = item.MaximumQuantity,\n                ShelfLocation = item.ShelfLocation,\n                LastCheckedAt = item.LastCheckedAt,\n                ProductId = item.ProductId,\n                ProductDisplayName = item.Product?.Name,\n                WarehouseId = item.WarehouseId,\n                WarehouseDisplayName = item.Warehouse?.Name\n            };\n\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Processes updates to an existing inventory item.\n        /// Validates that ID in URL matches form model ID.\n        /// Redirects to Details on success.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/inventory/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"/InventoryItem/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id, InventoryItemFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (id != model.Id)\n            {\n                return BadRequest(\"ID mismatch\");\n            }\n\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            if (!_repository.Exists(id))\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            var inventoryItem = new InventoryItem\n            {\n                Id = model.Id,\n                QuantityInStock = model.QuantityInStock,\n                MinimumQuantity = model.MinimumQuantity,\n                MaximumQuantity = model.MaximumQuantity,\n                ShelfLocation = model.ShelfLocation,\n                LastCheckedAt = model.LastCheckedAt,\n                ProductId = model.ProductId.Value,\n                WarehouseId = model.WarehouseId.Value\n            };\n\n            _repository.Update(inventoryItem);\n            return RedirectToAction(\"Details\", new { id });\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Displays delete confirmation page for an inventory item.\n        /// Sets ViewBag.CanDelete to control button visibility.\n        /// Returns NotFound if item doesn't exist.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/inventory/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"/InventoryItem/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var item = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (item == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            ViewBag.CanDelete = _repository.CanDelete(id);\n            return View(item);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Processes deletion of an inventory item.\n        /// Returns false if item has dependent records; redisplays delete view with error.\n        /// Redirects to Index on successful deletion.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/inventory/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"/InventoryItem/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [ActionName(\"Delete\")]\n        public IActionResult DeleteConfirmed(int id)\n        {\n            if (!_repository.Delete(id))\n            {\n                var item = _repository.GetById(id);\n                ViewBag.CanDelete = false;\n                ViewBag.ErrorMessage = \"Cannot delete this inventory item. Please check for dependencies.\";\n                return View(\"Delete\", item);\n            }\n\n            return RedirectToAction(\"Index\");\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// AJAX endpoint for searching inventory items.\n        /// Returns partial view with table rows matching the search term.\n        /// Supports searching by Product name, Warehouse name, and Shelf location.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/inventory/search\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Search(string? term)\n        {\n            var items = _repository.Search(term);\n            return PartialView(\"_InventoryItemTableRows\", items);\n        }\n    }\n}\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\Controllers\\InventoryItemController.cs"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DPd2zZgZyTsDvkCsH5qZAM__vscode-1779365922664","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

           $('#inventorySearchLoading').show();\n\n                // Debounce search requests (300ms)\n                searchTimeout = setTimeout(function() {\n                    $.ajax({\n Please try again.</td></tr>');\n                        },\n                        complete: function() {\n                            // Hide loading indicator\n                            $('#inventorySearchLoading').hide();\n                        }\n                    });\n                }, 300);\n            });\n\n            // Handle clear button\n            $('#clearInventorySearch').on('click', function() {\n                $('#inventorySearchInput').val('').focus();\n                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n                $('#inventorySearchLoading').show();\n\n                // Reload all records\n                $.ajax({\n                    url: '/inventory/search',\n                    data: { term: '' },\n                    method: 'GET',\n                    timeout: 5000,\n                    success: function(html) {\n                        $('#inventoryTableBody').fadeOut(150, function() {\n                            $(this).html(html).fadeIn(150);\n                        });\n                    },\n                    complete: function() {\n                        $('#inventorySearchLoading').hide();\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n        });\n    </script>\n}\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\Views\\InventoryItem\\Index.cshtml"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01WefWcrjnKboiAcVkBkboHW__vscode-1779365922666","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the quantity of the product ordered.\n        /// Must be between 1 and 1,000,000 units.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Range(1, 1000000, ErrorMessage = \"Quantity must be between 1 and 1,000,000.\")]\n        public int Quantity { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the unit price of the product at the time of order.\n        /// Must be between $0.01 and $1,000,000.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Range(0.01, 1000000, ErrorMessage = \"Unit price must be between 0.01 and 1,000,000.\")]\n        public decimal UnitPrice { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the total price for this order item (calculated field).\n        /// Typically quantity * unit price.\n        /// Must be between $0 and $100,000,000.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Range(0, 100000000, ErrorMessage = \"Total price must be between 0 and 100,000,000.\")]\n        public decimal TotalPrice { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the discount amount applied to this order item.\n        /// Must be between $0 and $1,000,000.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Range(0, 1000000, ErrorMessage = \"Discount must be between 0 and 1,000,000.\")]\n        public decimal Discount { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the date and time when this order item was created.\n        /// Required field.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Required(ErrorMessage = \"Created date is required.\")]\n        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; } = DateTime.Now;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the order ID that this item belongs to.\n        /// Required for form submission.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Required(ErrorMessage = \"Order is required.\")]\n        public int? OrderId { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the display name of the associated order (read-only, for display purposes).\n        /// </summary>\n        public string? OrderDisplayName { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the product ID for the item ordered.\n        /// Required for form submission.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Required(ErrorMessage = \"Product is required.\")]\n        public int? ProductId { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets or sets the display name of the selected product (read-only, for display purposes).\n        /// </summary>\n        public string? ProductDisplayName { get; set; }\n    }\n}\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\ViewModels\\OrderItem\\OrderItemFormModel.cs"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Bf9GGkmJc9YFjufCuFVAzD__vscode-1779365922675","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T23:17:35.189Z","hook_event_name":"UserPromptSubmit","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","prompt":"I am working on Lab 4 for my ASP.NET Core MVC InventoryManagement application.\r\n\r\nCreate only this file:\r\nInventoryManagement.DAL/Repositories/OrderItemEfRepository.cs\r\n\r\nTask:\r\nCreate an EF repository for OrderItem CRUD and AJAX search.\r\n\r\nRequirements:\r\n- namespace: InventoryManagement.DAL.Repositories\r\n- use InventoryManagement.Domain.Models\r\n- use Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore\r\n- inject InventoryManagementDbContext through constructor\r\n- implement methods:\r\n  List<OrderItem> GetAll()\r\n  OrderItem? GetById(int id)\r\n  void Add(OrderItem orderItem)\r\n  void Update(OrderItem orderItem)\r\n  bool Delete(int id)\r\n  bool Exists(int id)\r\n  bool CanDelete(int id)\r\n  List<OrderItem> Search(string? term, int maxResults = 50)\r\n\r\nBehavior:\r\n- GetAll should Include Order and Product, use AsNoTracking, order by CreatedAt descending.\r\n- GetById should Include Order and Product.\r\n- Add/Update/Delete should call SaveChanges().\r\n- Delete should return false if item does not exist.\r\n- CanDelete should return true only if item exists.\r\n- Search should include Order and Product.\r\n- If term is empty, return first maxResults ordered by CreatedAt descending.\r\n- If term has value, search by:\r\n  Order.OrderNumber\r\n  Product.Name\r\n- Use IQueryable<OrderItem> query to avoid Include/Where type issues.\r\n- Do not modify other files.","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T23:17:45.867Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"using InventoryManagement.Domain.Models;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace InventoryManagement.DAL.Repositories\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Entity Framework repository for OrderItem CRUD operations and search.\n    /// Manages order line items (products ordered in orders).\n    /// </summary>\n    public class OrderItemEfRepository\n    {\n        private readonly InventoryManagementDbContext _context;\n\n        public OrderItemEfRepository(InventoryManagementDbContext context)\n        {\n            _context = context;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets all order items from the database.\n        /// Includes related Order and Product entities.\n        /// Returns no-tracking query for read-only operations.\n        /// Ordered by creation date in descending order.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <returns>List of all order items ordered by creation date (newest first).</returns>\n        public List<OrderItem> GetAll()\n        {\n            return _context.OrderItems\n                .Include(oi => oi.Order)\n                .Include(oi => oi.Product)\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .OrderByDescending(oi => oi.CreatedAt)\n                .ToList();\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets a single order item by ID.\n        /// Includes related Order and Product entities.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"id\">The order item ID.</param>\n        /// <returns>The order item if found; otherwise null.</returns>\n        public OrderItem? GetById(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.OrderItems\n                .Include(oi => oi.Order)\n                .Include(oi => oi.Product)\n                .FirstOrDefault(oi => oi.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Adds a new order item to the database.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderItem\">The order item to add.</param>\n        public void Add(OrderItem orderItem)\n        {\n            _context.OrderItems.Add(orderItem);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Updates an existing order item in the database.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderItem\">The order item with updated values.</param>\n        public void Update(OrderItem orderItem)\n        {\n            _context.OrderItems.Update(orderItem);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Deletes an order item from the database.\n        /// Returns false if the item does not exist.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"id\">The ID of the order item to delete.</param>\n        /// <returns>True if deletion succeeded; false if item not found.</returns>\n        public bool Delete(int id)\n        {\n            if (!Exists(id))\n            {\n                return false;\n            }\n\n            var orderItem = _context.OrderItems.Find(id);\n            if (orderItem != null)\n            {\n                _context.OrderItems.Remove(orderItem);\n                _context.SaveChanges();\n                return true;\n            }\n\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Checks if an order item exists by ID.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"id\">The order item ID.</param>\n        /// <returns>True if the item exists; otherwise false.</returns>\n        public bool Exists(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.OrderItems.Any(oi => oi.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Checks if an order item can be deleted.\n        /// Currently, order items can always be deleted (no dependent entities).\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"id\">The order item ID.</param>\n        /// <returns>True if the item exists and can be deleted; otherwise false.</returns>\n        public bool CanDelete(int id)\n        {\n            return Exists(id);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Searches for order items by term.\n        /// If term is empty, returns the first maxResults items ordered by creation date descending.\n        /// If term has value, searches by Order number and Product name (case-insensitive).\n        /// Includes related Order and Product entities.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"term\">The search term (optional).</param>\n        /// <param name=\"maxResults\">The maximum number of results to return (default 50).</param>\n        /// <returns>List of order items matching the search criteria.</returns>\n        public List<OrderItem> Search(string? term, int maxResults = 50)\n        {\n            IQueryable<OrderItem> query = _context.OrderItems\n                .Include(oi => oi.Order)\n                .Include(oi => oi.Product);\n\n            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                // No search term: return first maxResults ordered by creation date descending\n                return query\n                    .OrderByDescending(oi => oi.CreatedAt)\n                    .Take(maxResults)\n                    .ToList();\n            }\n\n            // Search term provided: filter by Order number or Product name\n            var searchTerm = term.ToLower();\n            return query\n                .Where(oi =>\n                    oi.Order!.OrderNumber.ToLower().Contains(searchTerm) ||\n                    oi.Product!.Name.ToLower().Contains(searchTerm))\n                .OrderByDescending(oi => oi.CreatedAt)\n                .Take(maxResults)\n                .ToList();\n        }\n    }\n}\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement.DAL\\Repositories\\OrderItemEfRepository.cs"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HyjwaLRKPJ7Ry2zvYVCcA1__vscode-1779365922676","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

redirect to Details.\r\n\r\nDelete GET:\r\n- find item by id.\r\n- set ViewBag.CanDelete = _repository.CanDelete(id).\r\n- return Delete view.\r\n\r\nDelete POST:\r\n- call Delete(id).\r\n- if false, items).","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T23:19:03.495Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\nusing InventoryManagement.DAL.Repositories;\nusing InventoryManagement.Domain.Models;\nusing InventoryManagement.ViewModels.OrderItem;\n\nnamespace InventoryManagement.Controllers\n{\n    public class OrderItemController : Controller\n    {\n        private readonly OrderItemEfRepository _repository;\n\n        public OrderItemController(OrderItemEfRepository repository)\n        {\n            _repository = repository;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Displays list of all order items.\n        /// Supports both semantic (/order-items) and legacy (/OrderItem) routes.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/order-items\")]\n        [Route(\"/OrderItem\")]\n        [Route(\"/OrderItem/Index\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Index()\n        {\n            var items = _repository.GetAll();\n            return View(items);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Displays details for a specific order item.\n        /// Supports both semantic (/order-items/{id}) and legacy (/OrderItem/Details/{id}) routes.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/order-items/{id:int}\")]\n        [Route(\"/OrderItem/Details/{id:int}\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Details(int id)\n        {\n            var item = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (item == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return View(item);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Displays the create form for a new order item.\n        /// Initializes CreatedAt to current date/time.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/order-items/create\")]\n        [Route(\"/OrderItem/Create\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Create()\n        {\n            var model = new OrderItemFormModel\n            {\n                CreatedAt = DateTime.Now\n            };\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Processes creation of a new order item.\n        /// Maps form model to domain model and saves to database.\n        /// Redirects to Details on success.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/order-items/create\")]\n        [Route(\"/OrderItem/Create\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult Create(OrderItemFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var orderItem = new OrderItem\n            {\n                Quantity = model.Quantity,\n                UnitPrice = model.UnitPrice,\n                TotalPrice = model.TotalPrice,\n                Discount = model.Discount,\n                CreatedAt = model.CreatedAt,\n                OrderId = model.OrderId.Value,\n                ProductId = model.ProductId.Value\n            };\n\n            _repository.Add(orderItem);\n            return RedirectToAction(\"Details\", new { id = orderItem.Id });\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Displays the edit form for an existing order item.\n        /// Populates display names from related Order and Product.\n        /// Returns NotFound if item doesn't exist.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/order-items/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"/OrderItem/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id)\n        {\n            var item = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (item == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            var model = new OrderItemFormModel\n            {\n                Id = item.Id,\n                Quantity = item.Quantity,\n                UnitPrice = item.UnitPrice,\n                TotalPrice = item.TotalPrice,\n                Discount = item.Discount,\n                CreatedAt = item.CreatedAt,\n                OrderId = item.OrderId,\n                OrderDisplayName = item.Order?.OrderNumber,\n                ProductId = item.ProductId,\n                ProductDisplayName = item.Product?.Name\n            };\n\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Processes updates to an existing order item.\n        /// Validates that ID in URL matches form model ID.\n        /// Redirects to Details on success.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/order-items/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"/OrderItem/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id, OrderItemFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (id != model.Id)\n            {\n                return BadRequest(\"ID mismatch\");\n            }\n\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            if (!_repository.Exists(id))\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            var orderItem = new OrderItem\n            {\n                Id = model.Id,\n                Quantity = model.Quantity,\n                UnitPrice = model.UnitPrice,\n                TotalPrice = model.TotalPrice,\n                Discount = model.Discount,\n                CreatedAt = model.CreatedAt,\n                OrderId = model.OrderId.Value,\n                ProductId = model.ProductId.Value\n            };\n\n            _repository.Update(orderItem);\n            return RedirectToAction(\"Details\", new { id });\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Displays delete confirmation page for an order item.\n        /// Sets ViewBag.CanDelete to control button visibility.\n        /// Returns NotFound if item doesn't exist.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/order-items/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"/OrderItem/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var item = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (item == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            ViewBag.CanDelete = _repository.CanDelete(id);\n            return View(item);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Processes deletion of an order item.\n        /// Returns false if item has dependent records; redisplays delete view with error.\n        /// Redirects to Index on successful deletion.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/order-items/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"/OrderItem/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [ActionName(\"Delete\")]\n        public IActionResult DeleteConfirmed(int id)\n        {\n            if (!_repository.Delete(id))\n            {\n                var item = _repository.GetById(id);\n                ViewBag.CanDelete = false;\n                ViewBag.ErrorMessage = \"Cannot delete this order item. Please check for dependencies.\";\n                return View(\"Delete\", item);\n            }\n\n            return RedirectToAction(\"Index\");\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// AJAX endpoint for searching order items.\n        /// Returns partial view with table rows matching the search term.\n        /// Supports searching by order number and product name.\n        /// </summary>\n        [Route(\"/order-items/search\")]\n        [HttpGet]\n        public IActionResult Search(string? term)\n        {\n            var items = _repository.Search(term);\n            return PartialView(\"_OrderItemTableRows\", items);\n        }\n    }\n}\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\Controllers\\OrderItemController.cs"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01B1hJHw7TbQArgLG5FsTepV__vscode-1779365922677","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

am working on Lab 4 for my ASP.NET Core MVC InventoryManagement application.\r\n\r\nCreate only these files:\r\n- InventoryManagement/Views/OrderItem/Index.cshtml\r\n- InventoryManagement/Views/OrderItem/Details.cshtml\r\n- InventoryManagement/Views/OrderItem/Create.cshtml\r\n- InventoryManagement/Views/OrderItem/Edit.cshtml\r\n- InventoryManagement/Views/OrderItem/Delete.cshtml\r\n- InventoryManagement/Views/OrderItem/_OrderItemTableRows.cshtml\r\n\r\nTask:\r\nCreate OrderItem CRUD views with AJAX search, autocomplete dropdowns and custom date input.\r\n\r\nRequirements:\r\n- Use Bootstrap styling consistent with the app.\r\n- Index uses IEnumerable<InventoryManagement.Domain.Models.OrderItem>.\r\n- Details/Delete use InventoryManagement.Domain.Models.OrderItem.\r\n- Create/Edit use OrderItemFormModel.\r\n- Use InventoryManagement.ViewModels.Shared for AutocompleteDropdownModel and DateTimeInputModel.\r\n- Use anti-forgery token in forms.\r\n- Include validation summary and asp-validation-for spans where applicable.\r\n- Include _ValidationScriptsPartial in @section Scripts for Create/Edit.\r\n\r\nIndex:\r\n- Title: Order Items\r\n- Add Create Order Item button linking to /order-items/create.\r\n- Add search input id orderItemSearchInput.\r\n- Add loading indicator id orderItemSearchLoading.\r\n- Add clear button id clearOrderItemSearch.\r\n- Render records through partial:\r\n  @await Html.PartialAsync(\"_OrderItemTableRows\", items)\r\n- Use tbody id orderItemTableBody.\r\n- Add jQuery AJAX search:\r\n  GET /order-items/search with term\r\n  replace #orderItemTableBody with returned partial\r\n  debounce 300ms\r\n  small fade animation\r\n\r\n_OrderItemTableRows:\r\n- Render only <tr> rows.\r\n- Columns:\r\n  Order\r\n  Product\r\n  Quantity\r\n  Unit Price\r\n  Discount\r\n  Total\r\n  Created\r\n  Actions\r\n- Actions:\r\n  Details /order-items/{id}\r\n  Edit /order-items/{id}/edit\r\n  Delete /order-items/{id}/delete\r\n- If no records, show one row with \"No order items found.\"\r\n\r\nCreate/Edit:\r\n- Fields:\r\n  OrderId using _AutocompleteDropdown partial\r\n  ProductId using _AutocompleteDropdown partial\r\n  Quantity\r\n  UnitPrice\r\n  Discount\r\n  TotalPrice\r\n  CreatedAt using $('#orderItemSearchInput').on('input', function() {\n                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n                const term = $(this).val().trim();\n\n                // Show loading indicator\n                $('#orderItemSearchLoading').show();\n\n                // Debounce search requests (300ms)\n                searchTimeout = setTimeout(function() {\n                    $.ajax({\n                        url: '/order-items/search',\n                        data: { term: term },\n                        method: 'GET',\n                        timeout: 5000,\n                        success: function(html) {\n                            // Fade out and replace content\n                            $('#orderItemTableBody').fadeOut(150, function() {\n                                $(this).html(html).fadeIn(150);\n                            });\n                        },\n                        error: function() {\n
